# mahiro-skills skill index

Use this file as a compact discovery map. Runtime bundle membership still comes from `../.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`; this index is for humans and agents deciding which skill to load.

## Skills

- `asset-designer` — Asset director for production-ready website image assets and manifests. Trigger on: cutout/background removal, layer separation, transparent PNG packs, missing web assets, asset QA/delivery notes.
- `codex-asset-production` — Codex asset-lane orchestrator for production-ish web/game visual assets. Trigger on: Codex imagegen plus dicut cleanup, source sheet lane, asset-designer cleanup lane, asset provenance, visual asset QA handoff.
- `control-room-goals` — Goal Mode objective/DoD/next-action drafting and agent-owned application workflow. Trigger on: /goal, goal mode, create goal, DoD, next, safe boundary, verified/claimed evidence, handoff, reset, goal clarification.
- `cocoindex-rules-init` — Repo-local CocoIndex Code rule bootstrapper. Trigger on: create or patch `AGENTS.md` for `ccc` / `cocoindex-code`, semantic code-search doctrine, repo-local search rules, make agents prefer CocoIndex, `ดู repo หน่อย` / `หาโค้ดส่วนนี้` routing rules.
- `deep-research` — Deep research via Gemini. Trigger on: comprehensive research, source-backed analysis, deep dive, web-backed synthesis. Route a large corpus of live frontend/site/app UI references tied to a named frontend design decision to `frontend-design` instead.
- `direct-cli` — Direct executor playbook for Cursor CLI, Antigravity CLI, and Codex CLI through fresh tmux sessions. Trigger on: direct Cursor lane, direct Antigravity lane, agy lane, direct Codex lane, codex lane, tmux pane, fresh CLI session, yolo/offloaded executor lane.
- `forward` — Handoff and planning bridge for the next session. Trigger on: wrap up, handoff, forward this work, next session plan.
- `frontend-design` — Explicit repo-grounded, brand-relative frontend design planning, taste theses, and reference/fidelity contracts. Trigger on: design brief, brand-relative visual direction, reference anatomy, preserve/overhaul redesign plan, web/mobile reference set, image-first implementation handoff, rendered fidelity review, or a large frontend-reference corpus review tied to a named frontend design decision. Use `deep-research` instead for generic topic research or broad source-backed synthesis. Skip automatic loading for native model-taste baselines.
- `game-production` — Thin production director for complete games. Trigger on: game production audit, whole-game inventory, prototype vs vertical-slice vs production vs release readiness, production roadmap, content-complete gate, cross-discipline game lanes, performance/device/browser QA, save/deploy/legal release readiness.
- `gemini` — Control Gemini via MQTT WebSocket. Trigger on: Gemini tab automation, send message to Gemini, browser Gemini workflow, MQTT bridge.
- `learn` — Explore a codebase with parallel agents. Trigger on: learn repo, study codebase, explore repository, GitHub URL for study.
- `mac-calendar-booking` — Safe macOS Calendar event booking workflow with explicit confirmation. Trigger on: book calendar, add meeting to Mac Calendar, schedule event, create agenda then add event.
- `mahiro-docs-rules-init` — Repo-reality-first AGENTS.md and docs-family bootstrapper; layers Mahiro-style only as preferred direction, preserves target-repo mechanics, and adds CocoIndex/`ccc` guidance only when locally proven. Trigger on: initialize repo rules, create AGENTS.md, bootstrap project docs, under-documented repo.
- `mahiro-guidance-refine` — Session feedback to docs/rules/style guidance proposal workflow with scope classification. Trigger on: user corrects agent behavior, preferred pattern discovered, docs/rules update from lesson, code-style feedback to preserve, decide repo-local vs global vs skill-specific rule.
- `mahiro-style` — Mahiro code/review/implementation doctrine and fallback lens; repo-local reality wins before cross-repo taste. Trigger on: align to Mahiro style, review code shape, refactor style, naming/file structure/i18n boundaries, catch generic AI UI drift.
- `philosophy` — Display local philosophy and alignment rules. Trigger on: principles, philosophy check, alignment rules, how should we think about this.
- `project` — Clone and track external repos for study or development. Trigger on: project learn, project incubate, find tracked repo, list tracked projects, ghq symlink tracking.
- `recap` — Session orientation and awareness. Trigger on: recap, status now, resume context, what happened today, current focus.
- `rrr` — Session retrospective with lessons learned. Trigger on: retrospective, end of session, lessons learned, durable memory note.
- `sprite-workflow` — CLI-first sprite/Codex handoff workflow with an attributed 107-example prompt catalog/templates, sprite and effect jobs, selected-cycle motion-reference intake, chroma-key extraction, dicut cleanup, 2D-grid extraction, native and target-size anchor/scale/body-FX/alpha QA, motion-jitter reports, native-grid recovery, strict approved atlases, previews, manifests, and safe promotion gates. Trigger on: sprite prompt, sprite sheet, mascot frames, animation strip, motion reference, pixel snap, sprite atlas, contact sheet, preview GIF, imagegen handoff, sprite QA, or promote generated assets.
- `studying-codrops` — Explicit Codrops/Tympanus learning lane for mapping the site, studying article + live demo + source/case-study evidence, comparing creative-web techniques, and producing project-fit adaptation guidance. Trigger only when Codrops/Tympanus is named or `/studying-codrops` is invoked; do not auto-load for ordinary frontend work or use Codrops as universal taste.
- `uncodixify` — Explicit/evidence-triggered frontend audit and enforcement filter for generic AI/Codex output. Trigger on: explicit uncodixify request, second-pass UI audit, rendered reference leakage, AI-looking layouts, fake-premium SaaS polish, unsupported motion/filler UI. Skip before the first rendered pass when evaluating native model taste.
- `vfx-workflow` — Production runtime VFX workflow. Trigger on: game telegraph, cast, projectile, trail, impact, AOE, aura, status, barrier, pickup feedback, VFX cue timing, sockets/anchors, collision-overlay QA, reduced effects, pooling, effect budgets, VFX runtime integration or promotion.
- `web-asset-prompts` — Per-asset prompt writer for production-ready website image assets. Trigger on: transparent cutouts, chroma-key sources, overlay-safe hero/card images, aspect ratios, crop-safe web-ready prompts.
- `watch` — Learn from YouTube videos via Gemini transcription. Trigger on: watch this video, transcribe YouTube, summarize video, learn from a talk.

## Common bundles

- **Orientation bundle**: `recap`, `rrr`, `forward`
- **Project tracking bundle**: `project`, `learn`
- **Direct execution bundle**: `direct-cli`, `gemini`, `watch`
- **Repo doctrine bundle**: `mahiro-style`, `mahiro-docs-rules-init`, `mahiro-guidance-refine`, `philosophy`
- **CocoIndex bundle**: `cocoindex-rules-init`, `mahiro-guidance-refine`
- **Frontend design and assets bundle**: `frontend-design`, `uncodixify`, `web-asset-prompts`, `asset-designer`, `codex-asset-production`
- **Creative web study bundle**: `studying-codrops`, `frontend-design`, `learn`
- **Sprite workflow bundle**: `sprite-workflow`, `asset-designer`, `web-asset-prompts`, `codex-asset-production`, `direct-cli`
- **Game production bundle**: `game-production`, `vfx-workflow`, `sprite-workflow`, `codex-asset-production`, `asset-designer`, `frontend-design`

## Install examples

```bash
bun ./src/cli.ts install recap rrr forward --agent opencode --scope local
bun ./src/cli.ts install project learn --agent cursor,gemini --scope local
bun ./src/cli.ts install studying-codrops --agent letta-code --scope global
bun ./src/cli.ts install frontend-design uncodixify web-asset-prompts asset-designer codex-asset-production sprite-workflow --agent opencode --scope local
bun ./src/cli.ts install game-production vfx-workflow sprite-workflow codex-asset-production asset-designer frontend-design --agent opencode --scope local
bun ./src/cli.ts install --agent opencode --scope global
```
